    • Uses of ItemBuilder in dk.tohjuler.mcutils.items

      Methods in dk.tohjuler.mcutils.items that return ItemBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.addEnchantment(org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment enchantment, int level)
      Add an enchantment to the item
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.addItemFlags(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemFlag... flags)
      Add itemFlags to the item
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.addLore(Collection<String> lines)
      Add a line to the lore
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.addLore(String... lore)
      Add a line to the lore
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.applyPlaceholder(org.bukkit.entity.Player p)
      Apply placeholders to the item This requires PlaceholderAPI to be installed Applies to: - Display name - Lore
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.applyType(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Transform the item to a different type This will keep the amount, display name, lore, enchantments, unstackable status and item flags
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.clone() 
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.deserialize(String base64)
      Deserialize an item from a base64 itemstack Skull values DOES NOT WORK, it needs to be serialized from serialize() or ItemStackBase64.itemStackToBase64(ItemStack)
      static ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.fromBase64(String base64)
      Create a new ItemBuilder from a base64 itemstack Skull values DOES NOT WORK, it needs to be serialized from serialize() or ItemStackBase64.itemStackToBase64(ItemStack)
      static ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.fromString(String mat)
      Create a new ItemBuilder from a string.
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.hideEnchantment()
      Hide the enchantments
      static ItemBuilder YamlItem.loadItem(@NotNull ConfigurationFile cf, @NotNull String baseKey)
      Load an ItemBuilder from a yaml configuration file
      static ItemBuilder YamlItem.loadItem(@NotNull org.bukkit.configuration.ConfigurationSection cf, @NotNull String baseKey)
      Load an ItemBuilder from a yaml configuration section
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.modify(Function<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack,org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack> func)
      Modify the item, using a function Allows for more advanced modifications
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.modifyMeta(Function<org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta,org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta> func)
      Modify the item meta, using a function Allows for more advanced modifications
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.nonStackable()
      Make the item unstackable
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.removeTag(String key)
      Remove a tag from the item
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.replaceAllFromGui(String regex, Function<String,String> func)
      Replace placeholders from gui, in the lore and display name This should only be used by the GUI API
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.replaceDisplayName(String replace, String replaceWith)
      Replace text in the display name
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.replaceLore(String replace, List<String> replaceWith)
      Replace text in the lore
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.replaceLore(String replace, String... replaceWith)
      Replace text in the lore
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.replaceLore(String replace, String replaceWith)
      Replace text in the lore
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.replaceLoreAndDisplayName(String replace, String replaceWith)
      Replace some text in the lore and the display name
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.setAmount(int amount)
      Set the item amount
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.setDisplayName(String name)
      Set the item display name
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.setDurability(short durability)
      Get the item durability
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.setLore(Collection<String> lore)
      Set the item lore
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.setLore(String... lore)
      Set the item lore
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.setTag(String keu, String value)
      Set a NBT tag on the item
      ItemBuilder ItemBuilder.setType(org.bukkit.Material material)
      Set the material of the item
